name: template-doc-request
description: Generate a pre-meeting document/materials request email from a template. Supports three actions: 'generate' fills the template with provided variables (checks the knowledge graph for a user-customized template before falling back to the built-in default); 'save' stores a custom template in the knowledge graph; 'reset' removes the custom template and reverts to the built-in default.

inputs.sender_name: string? (required for generate — the person requesting the documents)
inputs.meeting_subject: string? (required for generate — the meeting topic)
inputs.meeting_time: string? (required for generate — when the meeting is scheduled)
inputs.documents_requested: string? (required for generate — comma-separated list of requested materials)
inputs.deadline: string? (optional for generate — when materials are needed by)
inputs.custom_template: string? (required for save — the template body to store)
